notes: Promotes a personal-org task into a target org. Backend payload struct PromoteTaskPayload has field `target_org_id: Uuid`. Caller must own the task in their personal org AND be a member of `target_org_id`. The task is re-encrypted under the target org's DEK. Returns `Versioned::ok(())` -> HTTP 200 with envelope `{version, data: null, error: null}` (NOT 201, NOT 204).
